ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date_game" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "visitor_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visiting team */,
  "visitor_pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the visiting team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "home_pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team */,
  "overtimes" INTEGER /* Number of overtimes in the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes about the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season during which the game was played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee who officiated the game */,
  "overtime_details" TEXT /* Details about the overtime periods */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_visitor_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team is part of */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is part of */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers committed by the player */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Player efficiency rating for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the team */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the team */,
  "total_steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the team */,
  "total_blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the team */,
  "total_fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed by the team */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made by the team */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted by the team */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made by the team */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers attempted by the team */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made by the team */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers committed by the team */,
  "team_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Team efficiency rating for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that won the championship in the season */,
  "runner_up_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that was the runner-up in the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_format" TEXT /* Format of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_runner_up_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_up_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "occupant_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that occupies the venue */,
  "venue_url" TEXT /* URL to the venue's official website */,
  "venue_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of the venue */,
  "venue_elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_occupant_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupant_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_venues" (
  "game_venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game-venue pairing */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Reference to the game */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue */,
  "attendance_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the venue's capacity filled for the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_venues_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_venues_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the coach joined the team */,
  "date_left" TEXT /* Date the coach left the team */,
  "coach_bio_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's biography */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the referee joined the league */,
  "date_left" TEXT /* Date the referee left the league */,
  "referee_bio_url" TEXT /* URL to the referee's biography */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)
